name: Project dossier and task relation architecture
definitionOfDone: AMCore defines total-control projects as case dossiers and tasks as supporting execution items
The task database has a relation field named 總控專案 pointing to the project database
The project database exposes the reciprocal relation field named 關聯任務
Legacy select project fields remain only as compatibility fields
Project pages use the dossier body structure for supporting tasks and process evidence
Project manifests and upgrade records are updated without copying project data into AMCore
